objective: Perform a complete, zero-assumption analysis of the local AgentForge repository, all PRD bundles, zip archives, and external artifacts (including Gemini-generated systems and the Universal Artifact Viewer at UniversalArtifactViewer_extracted/universal-artifact-viewer-v1). Produce a structured system-state output and explicit integration compatibility mapping.

component_contract.notes: All additional fields are serialized to JSON and displayed in a <pre> block. No live JSX execution engine present.

tabs.label: View
tabs.implementation_note: Renders a placeholder div ('Visual Preview Layer Active'). No real document renderer connected.

tabs.label: Code
tabs.implementation_note: Renders full documentData as pretty-printed JSON with a clipboard copy button.

tabs.label: Sync
tabs.implementation_note: Displays sync hook content. Tab exists in nav but renders same JSON block as code tab — sync_manager.py output not wired to this tab.

sync_system.mechanism: File copy via shutil.copy2, manifest-driven from sync_config.json
sync_system.event_bus_integration: NONE — pure file I/O, no events emitted

coding_standards.rule95_5: 95% reusable logic, 5% config — logic in /src and /hooks is immutable, config in /config
coding_standards.compliance_note: sync_manager.py violates event_driven_only — it uses direct file I/O with no event emission. ArtifactViewer.jsx partially complies: composition and data-driven, but no DI or interface contract.

mobile_readiness.notes: NavTab hides labels on mobile (hidden sm:inline). Layout uses h-screen flex column. Capacitor integration is pre-configured per README but no capacitor.config.js or package.json present in extracted files — dependency list incomplete.

missing_dependencies: package.json (no npm manifest found — Tailwind, Capacitor, lucide-react versions unknown)
Live document renderer for preview tab
Sync tab wiring to sync_manager.py output

missing_requirements: Live document renderer — preview tab is a shell placeholder
Event bus adapter — sync_manager.py emits no events
Input capture mechanism — no forms, no callbacks beyond clipboard copy
Workflow execution layer — no state machine, no step sequencing
Skill markdown renderer — no markdown parser wired in
required_adapters: EventBusAdapter — wrap sync_manager.py to emit AgentForge events on sync completion
DocumentRenderer — implement preview tab with real markdown/JSX renderer
InputCapture — add form layer or callback props for user input collection
WorkflowConnector — connect tab state to AgentForge pipeline-runner
SkillMarkdownParser — wire lucide-react rendering to skill .md files
what_works_today: Metadata display (projectName, sessionDate) in preview header

rules: FAIL IF ANY FIELD IS EMPTY
USE viewer_ground_truth AND viewer_integration_ground_truth SECTIONS AS AUTHORITATIVE — do not re-infer viewer capabilities from file names alone
